Update to Mobile Deposit and Corporate Capture Agreements with Customers
We revised content in the Deposit Processing Part to clarify that Central 1 does not provide a template for agreements your financial institution requires for your mobile deposit and corporate capture business customers. Itâs anticipated that your financial institution will want different information in your agreement with the customer, depending on your level of risk and processes. Central 1 provides mandatory clauses in the Service Schedule between Central 1 and your financial institution, which must be included in the agreement between your financial institution and your customer.
